data.title: Replace design-wireframe SKILL.md with minimal redirect stub; remove .test-index RED markers
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Replace the entire content of plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md with a minimal redirect stub. Then remove the 4 RED markers from .test-index that were added in the previous task.

Stub content:
---
name: design-wireframe
description: >
  This skill has been superseded by the dso:ui-designer agent. Use /dso:sprint
  or /dso:preplanning to create design artifacts.
user-invocable: true
---

# Design Wireframe (Superseded)

This skill has been replaced by the `dso:ui-designer` agent, invoked automatically
via `/dso:sprint` or `/dso:preplanning`.

To create design artifacts, run `/dso:sprint` on your story or invoke `/dso:preplanning`
for the full design + review workflow.

Backward compatibility: safe — this story depends on 8163-83a4, which updates preplanning
to invoke dso:ui-designer directly. By implementation time, preplanning no longer routes
through /dso:design-wireframe.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0 (all tests green, no RED markers)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md does not contain SUB-AGENT-GUARD
  Verify: ! grep -q 'SUB-AGENT-GUARD' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md does not contain Phase markup
  Verify: ! grep -q '## Phase' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md does not contain ADAPTER_FILE
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ADAPTER_FILE' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains 'ui-designer'
  Verify: grep -q 'ui-designer' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] 4 RED markers removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_design_wireframe_stub' .test-index
- [ ] test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh exits 0 (all 4 new assertions pass)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh
